previews.label: C Suite Sniper
whyItWorks: Recent domain spoof incident highlights brand protection needs.
Collaboration with legal and marketing indicates a focus on brand security.
Budget authority suggests decision-making power for security tools.
previews.subject: Enhance Your Brand Security Strategy
previews.body:
Hi David, Given recent domain spoof issues at Acme consumer brands, strengthening brand protection measures could be crucial. Your role in managing digital risk and your collaboration with legal and marketing teams suggest a focus on safeguarding your brand. Corsearch offers comprehensive Trademark search, screening, and brand protection solutions, proven to support cybersecurity and digital risk management. Acme consumer brands is a mid-size fmcg company headquartered in chicago with a portfolio of household cleaning, personal care, and food products sold across north america and europe. Trademark search, screening, and brand protection helps teams detect risky patterns, prioritize high-impact cases, and route follow-up actions without losing context.

Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?
